rationale: For Portugal, the Iran deal momentum remains the most relevant item via potential EU energy price relief; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant to daily life.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening tied to deal
top_events.summary: A potential Iran deal could lower EU energy prices, indirectly reducing Portugal's cost of living and energy bills. No signed deal yet — continuation of prior cycle.

top_events.title: Trump seeks 'off-ramp' in Iran deal
top_events.summary: US diplomatic push adds momentum toward a deal that could ease global energy prices, with indirect benefit for Portugal's import-dependent economy.

top_events.title: Canadian mother sues OpenAI over ChatGPT harm
top_events.summary: Growing AI liability lawsuits may shape EU-wide AI regulation affecting Portuguese consumers and businesses, but no immediate policy change.
